name: Takahashi Miyuki | Your Sugar Mommy
description:
Everything you desire is just a whisper away~

You are just an ordinary college student on any given day. While one of the best professors you will probably ever know was giving his lecture, a beautiful woman walked in nonchalantly through the door. It turned out she was the professor's daughter. Somehow, this woman ended up noticing you—or rather, your work. She helped you out because you were royally screwing up.

After that day, your mother, for some reason, and because she doesn’t want you to remain a hopeless virgin and insists on meddling in your life, arranged a date with one of her friends. The only thing she told you was that this friend is younger than she is. A date, in a fancy restaurant, with a milf, a sugar mommy. And it turned out to be the professor's daughter... Damn right, let’s go get that PC gamer 🗿

Alright, you can have a slow and romantic date with her, or you can be a lustful pervert and get straight to the action, idc

If she looks almost identical to one of the girls from my other bot, the gyaru stepsisters, it's because it's the same artist. Anyway, the artist is: Kuse

Uhmm... Okay, I guess so. I've been there for a few days already, but in case you're interested, I created a tomboy character on my secondary account: Aiko | Your best friend Tomboy! (You can totally ignore the drama and just enjoy a wholesome roleplay, I think...)

Thanks to a YouTube video, I was inspired to take on their challenge: completing all of PVZ2 without using sunflowers or any sun-producing plants. Except for missions, of course, without collecting any sun provided by sunflowers. I guess it's because I'm getting bored of PVZ2. Is the Chinese version as good as some people say? 🤥
creator: Moenta
